notes: g16 auto-detects C vs C++; g++16 is a compat symlink to the same driver
changelog: gcc_rebuild: skip make distclean — avoids autogen when BASE-VER changes
Self-host configure uses host gcc when unified libexec backends are relocated
install_unified_driver copies backends (no move) so cc1 paths stay valid
grok16-toolchain.sh: safe defaults for optional speedup env vars under set -u
